title: Decorative Lamps Language Pack
description: Add your own translation from Decorative Lamps to your world. Edit the pack and play!
body:
### How to add custom translation
1. extract the ZIP file
2. go through the folders to the JSON files
3. edit these files how you like or
4. copy the _en_us.json_ file and name it after the in-game entry from [this Table](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Language#Languages)
5. edit the file and change the values on the right side to your liking
6. save every thing and compress _pack.mcmeta_, _pack.png_ and _assets_ into a new ZIP file
7. Copy this ZIP file into your resourcepack folder
8. Play!

(If your want to see your translation included into the newest mod version, contact us over the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/xWgGPKme4a))
